name: cowrie2neo
description: Parse cowrie honeypot logs into a neo4j database. Tool: https://github.com/xlfe/cowrie2neo. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #553 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map cowrie2neo output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved cowrie2neo output file to parse instead of running it live.
